description: Row-level Copper stage ordinals (copper_provisional / copper_confirmed / copper_continuous) derived from merged_bronze_labels_v2 by nextier_merged_copper_stage_labeling_v1.
sql: SELECT name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS datetime_fmt, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS copper_provisional, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS copper_confirmed, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS copper_continuous, fleet_name, pad_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS algorithm_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processing_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS created_at FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
